layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing for containers (p-6, p-8) to create breathing room. Dense spacing (gap-4) for data tables and calendar grids.
layout.grid: Control Room Grid Mode. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for KPI cards. For calendars, use explicit CSS Grid with 7 columns (days) and multiple rows (hours).
layout.radius: Subtle roundness. Use rounded-lg (8px) for cards, rounded-md for inputs/buttons.
layout.borders: 1px solid border-[#E4E0D6] on cards and structural elements. Expose grid lines in calendar view with border-r and border-b.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2C4C3B] text-white hover:bg-[#3C634D] shadow-sm. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E4E0D6] text-[#1E1E1E] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA].
components.kpi_cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (#E4E0D6), no heavy shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm. Include a subtle icon.
components.tables: Dense. Header row: bg-[#F4F1EA] text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-[#5C5C5C]. Row hover: bg-[#FBF9F6]. On mobile, convert table rows to vertical cards.
components.sidebar_nav: bg-[#FBF9F6] border-r border-[#E4E0D6] p-6. Links: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-[#5C5C5C] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] hover:text-[#1E1E1E]. Active link: bg-[#E4E0D6] text-[#1E1E1E].
components.login_auth: Split screen layout. Left: Hero image with subtle overlay. Right: Centered login form with generous padding (p-12), clear H1, and clean inputs.
components.modals: Glassmorphism overlay (bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal content: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-xl border border-[#E4E0D6] shadow-xl p-6. Top right close button.
components.forms: Inputs: border border-[#E4E0D6] rounded-md focus:border-[#2C4C3B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2C4C3B]. Labels: text-sm font-medium mb-1.5 block.
components.empty_states: Centered content. Soft illustration or large subtle icon (text-[#E4E0D6]), h3 heading, and descriptive text followed by a call-to-action button.
components.schedule_editor: Weekly recurring editor. Columns for Mon-Sun. Time slots visually represented as distinct, draggable/clickable blocks (bg-[#F4F1EA] border-[#E4E0D6]). Selected slots use bg-[#2C4C3B] text-white.
components.calendar_grid: Weekly/Monthly view resembling Cal.com. Absolute positioning or CSS grid for events. Color-code events by 'docente'. Highlight current time with a terracotta (#D96C4A) horizontal line.

animations.interactive_elements: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for hover/focus states.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion staggered fade-up. opacity: 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0.
animations.calendar_events: Hover: scale-105 or z-10 elevation with a subtle shadow.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 minimum contrast. White text on Primary (#2C4C3B) is accessible. Secondary action texts must be dark.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#2C4C3B] focus-visible:outline-none.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button', data-testid='nav-link-dashboard').

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT RULE: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Lato, or Open Sans. Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' via Fontshare (or standard @font-face) for headings, and 'Outfit' via Google Fonts for body text.
STRICT RULE: Avoid all generic SaaS gradients (e.g., purple to teal). Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette provided.
LANGUAGE: The entire user interface must be in Italian ('Dashboard', 'Appuntamenti', 'Docenti', 'Clienti', 'Impostazioni', 'Esci', etc.).
RESPONSIVE: Must be mobile-first. Data tables MUST convert to stacked cards on mobile devices. Calendar grids must allow horizontal scroll or switch to a daily view on mobile.

CALENDAR/SCHEDULE: The core feature is the appointment calendar and schedule editor. Implement a sophisticated grid (like Cal.com) where 'docenti' can mark availability blocks and admins can schedule 'appuntamenti'.
DB STRUCTURE: Revise the provided Python backend DB to include explicit Primary Keys (UUIDs or Auto-increment IDs) for robust relations.
TESTING: Every button, link, and form input MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on its role.
